{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20848_1
|class_id=20848
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=collection@20848_2
|fame=95
|art=95
|fth=95
|civ=95
|tech=100
|ss1=Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail HP +50<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail DEF +5<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail RUSH +5<br>Files fully restored: 100/100
|ss2=Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail HP +100<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail ATK +10<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail DEF +10<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail RUSH +10<br>Files fully restored: 100/100
|ss3=Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail HP +150<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail ATK +15<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail DEF +15<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail RUSH +15<br>Files fully restored: 100/100
|ss4=Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail HP +150<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail ATK +15<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail DEF +15<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail RUSH +15<br>Files fully restored: 100/100
|ss7=Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail HP +150<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail ATK +15<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail DEF +15<br>Per 5 Incubator Files fully restored, Snail RUSH +15<br>Files fully restored: 100/100<br> (Awakened)
}}
